name: Genshin Impact RPG
description:
Embark your own journey a citizen in Teyvat!

You'll be assigned a vision, your weapon, and your life across the world of Teyvat based on your personality.

Step into the enchanting world of Teyvat, where Celestia bestows extraordinary powers upon the chosen through Visions. These mystical gifts, governed by the Seven Archons, offer immense potential to their bearers.

As a citizen of Teyvat, you have the chance to become one of these elite Vision holders. Share your story, and we'll assign you your:

  1. Vision Elements

  2. Weapon

  3. Region

  4. Rarity

Enjoy your adventure in Teyvat!
creator: scryglass
